title: Determine the exact value of R(B6, B6)
lean_gate_reason: Lean is not the shortest remaining path because the exact theorem is already in prior art; the blocker is rediscovery status, not proof formalization.
micro_paper_assessment: Fails the micro-paper lane because the exact instance R(B6, B6) = 26 is already covered by the older Rousseau-Sheehan prime-power diagonal theorem and restated in Wesley (2026).
strongest_honest_claim: The local Paley-25 witness correctly rederives the known exact value R(B6, B6) = 26, but it does not produce a frontier-novel result.
candidate_theorem_slice: R(B6, B6) = 26, already settled in prior art; the local artifact is at most a compact rederivation via the Paley graph on 25 vertices.
